Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Netherclaw]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Ruby unleashed the Netherclaw technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin summoned the black-bladed sword, Netherclaw.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Netherclaw is a black-bladed sword used by Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Netherclaw was considered as a potential option for the sword.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin holds a weapon called Netherclaw.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Netherclaw is a technique Yerin forges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — The Netherclaw technique manifests as a three-clawed red hand made of red strands of madra.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Netherclaw is a black-bladed sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin called Netherclaw back to her hand.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Netherclaw's binding uses claws forged of sword and blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Netherclaw boils with silver-and-scarlet madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Netherclaw is a sword that was breaking down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Netherclaw was made for fights between Archlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin activated Netherclaw’s binding.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
